simple-zenoh-java-client
  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Help

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractStreamTransport
Shared skeleton for all stream-oriented Transport implementations (TCP, TLS).
AbstractTransport
Lifecycle skeleton shared by every Transport implementation, regardless of whether the underlying protocol is stream-oriented (TCP, TLS) or message-oriented (WebSocket).
Close
The Zenoh transport-level CLOSE message.
Declare
The Zenoh network-level DECLARE message: a container that carries a single DeclareBody entry (DeclareSubscriber, UndeclareSubscriber, DeclareKeyExpr, etc.) plus network-message-level extensions (QoS, Timestamp, NodeId).
Declare.Body
DeclareBody union.
Declare.Body.BodyKind
 
DeclareSubscriber
The Zenoh DeclareSubscriber sub-message: tells the router that we want to be routed messages matching a given key expression.
DiscoveredNode
A Zenoh node observed on the local multicast segment via HELLO messages.
Encoding
The Zenoh Encoding field carried inside a Put payload.
Extension
Zenoh extension (TLV chain element).
Extension.Encoding
Encoding tag: the shape of the extension body.
Frame
The Zenoh transport-level FRAME message: a container that carries one or more serialised network messages (typically Push) with a single shared sequence number.
Hello
The Zenoh scouting-level HELLO message.
Init
The Zenoh transport-level INIT message.
Init.InitAck
Immutable value carrier for the server's InitAck reply.
Init.InitSyn
Immutable value carrier for a client-side InitSyn.
Interest
The Zenoh network-level INTEREST message: asks the router to send us the DECLARE records (of subscribers / queryables / tokens / keyexprs) matching a given key expression.
Interest.Mode
 
KeepAlive
The Zenoh transport-level KEEP_ALIVE message.
KeyExpr
Zenoh key expression: a string with wildcard semantics matching the spec at zenoh.io/docs/manual/abstractions.
Open
The Zenoh transport-level OPEN message.
Open.OpenAck
Immutable value carrier for the server's OpenAck reply.
Open.OpenSyn
Immutable value carrier for a client-side OpenSyn.
PureJavaZenohPublisher
Pure-Java Zenoh 1.x publisher client.
PureJavaZenohPublisher.Builder
Fluent builder mirroring the shape of io.mdudel.zenoh.ZenohClient.Builder so switching between the JNI-backed and pure-Java publishers is a one-line change at the call site.
PureJavaZenohScout
Pure-Java Zenoh 1.x scouting client.
PureJavaZenohScout.Builder
 
PureJavaZenohScout.Mode
Scouting mode.
PureJavaZenohSubscriber
Pure-Java Zenoh 1.x subscriber client.
PureJavaZenohSubscriber.Builder
Fluent builder mirroring PureJavaZenohPublisher.Builder so switching between the two facades at a call site is a one-line change.
PureJavaZenohSubscriber.TopicListener
Callback surface for topic discovery.
Push
The Zenoh network-level PUSH message: a fire-and-forget carrier that routes a Put (or a Del) payload to a key expression.
Put
The Zenoh zenoh-level PUT message: the actual payload delivered under a key expression, carried as the body of a Push.
RBuf
Read-side byte buffer with a cursor.
Sample
One received message delivered to a Subscription.
Scout
The Zenoh scouting-level SCOUT message.
ScoutListener
Callback interface for PureJavaZenohScout discovery events.
SessionException
Checked exception for session-layer failures (handshake failure, unexpected remote reply, publish on non-OPEN session, close-timeout, lease expired).
SessionState
The lifecycle states of a ZenohSession.
StreamFramer
Stream-transport framing helpers for Zenoh 1.x over stream-oriented links (TCP, TLS, WSS).
Subscription
A live subscription handle.
TcpTransport
Plain-TCP implementation of Transport for the Zenoh 1.x publisher.
Timestamp
A Zenoh HLC (Hybrid Logical Clock) timestamp carried inside a Put or as a network-level Timestamp extension.
TlsConfig
Immutable TLS configuration for TlsTransport.
TlsConfig.Builder
 
TlsTransport
TLS + optional mTLS implementation of Transport for the Zenoh 1.x publisher.
Transport
Minimal transport SPI for the publisher.
TransportException
Checked exception for transport-layer failures (connect refused, read timeout, malformed stream framing, oversized frame, remote close).
UndeclareSubscriber
The Zenoh UndeclareSubscriber sub-message: tells the router that a previously-declared subscriber should be torn down.
VarInt
Unsigned LEB128 variable-length integer codec used pervasively by the Zenoh 1.x wire protocol.
VarInt.Decoded
Result of a VarInt.decode(byte[], int) call: the value, and where the cursor stopped.
WBuf
Growable write-side byte buffer used by the codec.
WhatAmI
The role of a Zenoh node, as encoded in the low 2 bits of the length/WhatAmI byte inside INIT and OPEN messages.
WhatAmIMatcher
Scouting-side role matcher bitmap.
WsTransport
WebSocket implementation of Transport for the Zenoh 1.x publisher, backed by the JDK's built-in WebSocket (JDK 11+).
ZenohId
Zenoh node identifier.
ZenohJavaPubAnt
Minimal command-line Zenoh publisher built on the pure-Java PureJavaZenohPublisher facade.
ZenohJavaScoutAnt
Minimal command-line Zenoh scouting / node-discovery tool built on the pure-Java PureJavaZenohScout facade.
ZenohJavaSubAnt
Minimal command-line Zenoh subscriber built on the pure-Java PureJavaZenohSubscriber facade.
ZenohSession
A Zenoh 1.x client session over any Transport.
ZenohSession.Builder
 
ZenohSession.DiscoveryListener
Callback invoked once per DECLARE record the router returns in response to an INTEREST.

Rebuilt from commit 2d2e383 at 2026-07-12 15:42 UTC
